_comment: Bootstrap deployment configuration. Copy this file to 'deployment.config.json' (git-ignored) and replace every placeholder with your own AWS / GitHub / DNS values. It is consumed by the AWS CDK app in infra/ (via infra/cert_ra_infra/config.py) and documents the values also needed by docker-bake.hcl and the GitHub Actions workflows (see docs/deployment.md). The AWS account id is taken from your AWS credentials at CDK synth time, so it is only listed here for the container registry (ECR).
